name: my-brain
description: Self-hosted memory and orchestration layer for MCP clients.

scripts.auth:refresh:
docker compose up -d --build --force-recreate my-brain-orchestrator my-brain-web && for i in $(seq 1 30); do code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/mybrain-health.out -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health || true); [ "$code" = "200" ] && break; sleep 2; done && token=$(cat .secrets/auth-token) && curl -s -o /tmp/mybrain-login.out -w '%{http_code}' -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/login -H 'content-type: application/json' --data "{\"token\":\"$token\"}" && printf '
' && cat /tmp/mybrain-login.out
scripts.lint: pnpm exec eslint src/orchestrator src/mcp-bridge src/web && pnpm run format:check
